_note: Funding paths for ZABAL Gamez builders - real, verified grant programs (Base/Optimism ecosystem, where July builds live). Retroactive-first: ship, then get funded. Verified 2026-06-26 from official sources. Ranges are what the programs publish; they change, so each links to the canonical page - we do not promise amounts. Add a program by appending to programs[]. type: retroactive | rewards | accelerator | investment. chain: where your build should live to qualify.
intro: The ZAO ethos: ship in public, get funded for what you built. These are real funding paths for a ZABAL Gamez build - most are retroactive, so the work is the application. Build on Base, keep your repo public, document your impact.

programs.name: Base Builder Grants
programs.what: Fast retroactive grants for shipped projects that bring real value to the Base ecosystem. Run by the Base team; rewards deployed, working code over pitches. Eligible work spans apps, tooling, infra, creative, content, and community.
programs.how: You are discovered, or nominated via a public form. Selected builders are contacted directly.

programs.name: Base Builder Rewards
programs.range: ~2 ETH / week, distributed across active builders
programs.what: Ongoing weekly ETH rewards for active builders - good for experimentation and learning while you ship.
programs.how: Be an active onchain builder on Base; rewards are distributed by the program.

programs.name: Optimism Retro Funding (RetroPGF)
programs.what: Retroactive public-goods funding from the Optimism Collective. Base builders qualify as part of the Superchain. Rewards demonstrated impact (open-source tools, infra, education) - apply after the work is live, evaluated by badgeholders.
programs.how: Apply with a Farcaster account via the Optimism Atlas platform; verify your onchain contracts + public repo.

programs.name: Base Batches
programs.what: A founder accelerator: structured development, mentorship, and a Pitch Day to investors including Coinbase Ventures. For builders ready to go full-time.

programs.name: Base Ecosystem Fund
programs.what: Early investment led by Coinbase Ventures for teams building serious products on Base.
programs.how: For teams pursuing venture funding - typically via warm intro / the Base ecosystem.
